title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Moderate to strong thunderstorms are expected today

---Risk Areas---

ENHD
S Poland, E moravia, W Slovakia, E Austria & W Hungary

Moderate to strong thunderstorms are expected.
A squall line is forecast for E Moravia into W Slovakia. Another system is forecast for Poland where severe wind is the biggest threat.
The main show of the day is expected to be in E Austria and W Hungary where a strong MCS with severe to damaging wind gusts is forecast into N Balkan.
The main threats are:
- Severe wind gusts - up to 120+km/h is possible in S Hungary
- Hail - up to 3cm in locally stronger storms
- Heavy rain
